!Sample_treatment_protocol_ch1: Pregnant mice at gestational day E12.5 were injected intraperitoneally (IP) with 30 mg/kg poly(I:C) dsRNA from Sigma Aldrich (St. Louis, MO, cat #P0913) or with vehicle control (sterile 0.9% saline) injected at 5ul per gram of body weight. Pregnancy was determined to be E12.5 by visualizing vaginal seminal plug, noted as embryonic day 0.5 (E0.5) and by an increase in body weight.
!Sample_extract_protocol_ch1: Total RNA was isolated using Ambion RNAqueous total RNA Isolation Kit and assayed using Agilent RNA 6000 Nano Bioanalyzer kit/instrument.
!Sample_data_processing: Reads from RNA-seq were aligned to the mouse genome (mm9) using STAR (version 2.4.2a).
